query:
SELECT
            SUM(prompts)::BIGINT AS prompts,
            SUM(tool_uses)::BIGINT AS tool_uses,
            SUM(errors)::BIGINT AS errors,
            COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS "sessions!"
          FROM plugin_session_summaries
          WHERE user_id = $1
            AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
